name: Fairy Tale Prologue: Journey's Dawn
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｆａｉｒｙ Ｔａｌｅ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>フェアリーテイル</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>序</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じょ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>章</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>旅</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>たび</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>立</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ちの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>暁</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぎょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>光</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_rom: Fearī Teiru Joshō Tabidachi no Gyōkō
desc: Any battle damage a player takes is halved. If you control a LIGHT Beast monster or a Level 7 or 8 Dragon Synchro Monster: You can draw 1 card. You can only use this effect of "Fairy Tale Prologue: Journey's Dawn" once per turn. During your Standby Phase: You can send this card from the Field Zone to the GY; place 1 Field Spell from your hand or Deck face-up in your Field Zone, except "Fairy Tale Prologue: Journey's Dawn".
eff: Any battle damage a player takes is halved. If you control a LIGHT Beast monster or a Level 7 or 8 Dragon Synchro Monster: You can draw 1 card. You can only use this effect of "Fairy Tale Prologue: Journey's Dawn" once per turn. During your Standby Phase: You can send this card from the Field Zone to the GY; place 1 Field Spell from your hand or Deck face-up in your Field Zone, except "Fairy Tale Prologue: Journey's Dawn".

action: Sends itself from field to Graveyard for cost
Places cards from your hand in your Field Zone
Places cards from your Deck in your Field Zone
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
